revision.text:
[[ja:伊射奈美神社 (穴吹町)]] {{Expand Japanese|伊射奈美神社 (穴吹町)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Izanami Shrine | native_name = 伊射奈美神社 | image = Izanami Shrine, Anabuki.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Izanami Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.055929|134.151498}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Izanami|lt=Izanami|ar|إزانامي|az|İzanami|bcl|Izanami|bs|Izanami|ca|Izanami|da|Izanami|el|Ιζανάμι|en|Izanami|eo|Izanami|es|Izanami|fa|ایزانامی|fi|Izanami|fr|Izanami|he|איזאנמי|hr|Izanami|hu|Izanami|hy|Իզանամի|id|Izanami|it|Izanami|ja|イザナミ|ko|이자나미|mk|Изанами|mni|ꯏꯓꯥꯅꯥꯃꯤ|pt|Izanami|ru|Идзанами|simple|Izanami|sl|Izanami|sr|Изанами|sv|Izanami|ta|இசநமி|th|อิซานามิ|tl|Izanami|tr|Izanami|uk|Ідзанамі|zh|伊邪那美|qid=Q682306|1=Izanami}} }} {{nihongo|'''Izanami Shrine'''|伊射奈美神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)|ja|阿波国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11657514|1=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)}} ** Series ordinal: 10 ** P155: {{ill|Q135041307|ltq=Q135041307|qid=Q135041307|1=Yokotano Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135041309|ltq=Q135041309|qid=Q135041309|1=Takeno Shrine (Q135041309)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Mima, Tokushima|lt=Mima|ar|ميما (توكوشيما)|azb|میما، توکوشیما|ca|Mima (ciutat)|ceb|Mima Shi|ce|Мима (гӀала)|de|Mima|en|Mima, Tokushima|envoyage|Mima|es|Mima (Tokushima)|fa|میما، توکوشیما|fi|Mima|fr|Mima|frvoyage|Mima|gl|Mima|hy|Միմա (քաղաք)|id|Mima, Tokushima|it|Mima|ja|美馬市|ko|미마시|mzn|میما، توکوشیما|nl|Mima|pl|Mima|pt|Mima|ro|Mima|ru|Мима (город)|sv|Mima, Tokushima|tg|Мима|tl|Mima, Tokushima|tr|Mima|tt|Мима (шәһәр)|uk|Міма (Токусіма)|vi|Mima, Tokushima|war|Mima, Tokushima|zh_classical|美馬市|zh_min_nan|Mima-chhī|zh_yue|美馬|zh|美馬市|qid=Q857828|1=Mima, Tokushima}} * {{ill|Q907457|ltq=Q907457|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} * {{ill|Q1156496|ltq=Q1156496|qid=Q1156496|1=Mima District, Tokushima}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.055929|134.151498}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * Izanami Shrine, Anabuki.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q682306|ltq=Q682306|qid=Q682306|1=Izanami}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183184 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11545372|ltq=Q11545372|qid=Q11545372|1=Senior Sixth Rank}} * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 9480005005070 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041308|ltq=Q135041308|qid=Q135041308|1=Isanamino Shrine}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県美馬市穴吹町三島字舞中島52', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:伊射奈美神社 (穴吹町)]] {{wikidata link|Q43594845}} == Japanese content == {{otheruses|the shrine in Anabuki-chō, Mima|the shrine in Mima-chō, same city|Izanami Shrine (Mima-chō)}} {{神社 |名称 = Izanami Shrine |画像 = [[File:Izanami Shrine, Anabuki.jpg|250px|Izanami Shrine (Anabuki-chō)]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Mima|Q857828|qid=Q857828|1=Mima, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Anabuki-chō Mishima|Q28689958|qid=Q28689958|1=Anabuki-chō Mishima}} Aza Mainakashima 52 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Takemikazuchi}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi-no-Mikoto|1=Futsunushi|qid=Q1107286}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sarutahiko-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} |神体 = |社格 = former {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} |創建 = unknown[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/816135 『名神序頌』岡本監輔 著] (National Diet Library Digital Collections) |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = April 22, summer grand festival (irregular), autumn grand festival |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Izanami
Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Izanami Shrine''' (いざなみじんじゃ) is a shrine in Mainakashima, {{ill|lt=Anabuki-chō Mishima|Q28689958|qid=Q28689958|1=Anabuki-chō Mishima}}, {{ill|lt=Mima|Q857828|qid=Q857828|1=Mima, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === History === It is one of the candidate shrines for Izanami Shrine in Mima District, Awa Province, listed in the Shikinaisha. Formerly a {{ill|lt=Sonsha|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. In old times it was called Jūnisha Daigongen / Jūnisho Daigongen. Its founding is unknown, but there is a record that a provincial offering was made in Enryaku 7''{{ill|lt=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten|Q4093011|qid=Q4093011|1=Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten}} 36 Tokushima Prefecture'' (1986 ISBN 4040013603), entry "Izanami Shrine (Anabuki-chō)". ''Meishin Jojū'' gives a founding around the {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|qid=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} period ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|qid=Q23897|1=859}}-{{ill|lt=877|Q23905|qid=Q23905|1=877}}). The same-named {{ill|lt=Izanami Shrine (Mima-chō)|Q43594855|qid=Q43594855|lt=Izanami Shrine|1=Izanami Shrine, Mima}} in {{ill|lt=Mima-chō|Q11609479|qid=Q11609479|1=Mimachō}} of the same city and {{ill|lt=Kōtsu Shrine (Yoshinogawa)|UNKNOWN|lt=Kōtsu Shrine}} are also listed as candidate shrines for the same Shikinaisha. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami-no-Mikoto|1=Izanami}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q1502690|lt=Takemikazuchi-no-Mikoto|1=Takemikazuchi}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q1107286|lt=Futsunushi-no-Mikoto|1=Futsunushi|qid=Q1107286}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Sarutahiko-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Access === * About 5 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Anabuki Station|Q4750609|qid=Q4750609|1=Anabuki Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Line|Q899310|qid=Q899310|1=Tokushima Line}} of {{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|qid=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}. === Notes === {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Izanami Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Izanami Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Izanami Shrine]][[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:美馬市の歴史]] [[Category:美馬市の建築物]]
